headline: Qualcomm Weighs ParkerVision Patent Appeal Against Growing AI50 Recognition
summary: ParkerVision has challenged Qualcomm in an appeal that targets an alleged contradiction in Qualcomm's patent infringement arguments, potentially affecting ongoing litigation. The appeal could reopen aspects of a long-running patent dispute and create a path to renewed trial proceedings. Qualcomm, traded as NasdaqGS:QCOM, has been recognized on Clarivate's AI50 benchmark for leadership in AI related technology development. The combination of legal developments and external recognition in AI...

headline: Bernstein Lowers Qualcomm (QCOM) PT, Says Expectations “Now Appear Much Too High”
summary: QUALCOMM Incorporated (NASDAQ:QCOM) is included among the Dividend Stock Portfolio for Income: 15 Stocks to Invest In. On March 26, Bernstein Research downgraded QUALCOMM Incorporated (NASDAQ:QCOM) to Market Perform from Outperform. It cut its price target to $140 from $175. The firm pointed to memory-related headwinds, noting that higher prices are having a “deleterious effect” […]
